scripts.dev: npm run dev:search && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names theme,hugo,pagefind,webp "node scripts/themeGenerator.js --watch" "hugo server --source . --renderToMemory=false --bind 0.0.0.0 --port 1313 --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged" "node scripts/pagefindWatch.js" "node scripts/webpWatch.js"
scripts.build: npm run build:theme && npm run docs:validate && npm run docs:materialize-inherited && npm run build:site
scripts.preview: npm run build:search && hugo server --source . --bind 0.0.0.0 --port 1313 --environment production --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged
scripts.build:search: npm run build && npm run build:search-index
